VUB–Leeds Algebra School (2026)

8–12 June 2026 • Brussels, Belgium

Organised within the topYB International Joint Research Group (IJRG).

TopYB | Overview | Registration | Poster session | Programme | Location & Travel | Organisers

Location & travel

The Algebra School takes place in Brussels, Belgium, hosted by VUB. Practical details will be posted as they are confirmed.

Venue

LIC.0.04 Learning Theatre VUB Etterbeek Campus.
City
Brussels, Belgium
Host
Vrije Universiteit Brussel (VUB)
Address
Pleinlaan 2, B-1050 Brussels, Belgium

How to get to Brussels

By plane: Brussels has two international airports: Brussels Zaventem (BRU) and Brussels South Charleroi (CRL). Brussels Zaventem is well-connected to the city by train and by bus. From Brussels Charleroi there are numerous Flibco Shuttle buses leading directly to Bruxelles-Midi or trains from Charleroi city to Bruxelles Central and Midi.

By train: Brussels has many train stations. The main ones are Bruxelles-Midi (which is reached by high-speed trains such as Eurostars or TGVs) and Bruxelles-Central.

Where to stay in Brussels

As there are very few hotels close to the campus, we suggest to choose an hotel closer to the city center. Here is a short list of possible alternatives:

  • NH collection Brussels Grand Sablon
  • NH Brussels Carrefour de L'Europe
  • Hilton Brussels Grand Place
  • ibis Hotel Brussels off Grand Place
  • Pillows City Hotel Brussels Centre
  • Argus Hotel
  • Hôtel Chambord
  • Aqua Hotel
  • Hotel Barsey by Warwick
  • Best Western City Centre

Questions?

Contact: Leandro Vendramin (VUB) • Ilaria Colazzo (Leeds)
